title: Big Buck Bunny (Direct Node)
description: A classic, beautifully rendered animation tracking a giant, lovable rabbit as he plots a comical revenge against three bullying woodland pests.

title: Elephants Dream (Direct Node)
description: The world's first completely open-source 3D animated cinematic short film, following two characters exploring a massive, strange mechanical world.

title: For Bigger Blazes (Direct Node)
description: A high-bitrate, ultra-responsive digital video stream node optimized for testing local application canvas rendering speeds and player stability.
